markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO performance and discuss website optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **SEO is delivering exceptional results:** A key commercial keyword ("best corporate language training platforms...") jumped from \#26 to page one, now appearing in AI Overviews. This is a significant win, as the keyword has a high difficulty score of 50.
  - [**A cookie bot issue is skewing GA4 data:** The bot is blocking analytics tags from firing before consent, causing a major discrepancy between GA4 (low traffic) and Google Search Console (GSC), which shows \>400 organic visitors.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [**Website updates are planned to improve conversion:** The pricing page will get a feature grid, and a new "Talaera Professional" page will be created to clearly define the tier's value proposition.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**Content publishing will be automated:** GrowthX will use a WordPress API key to stage content, saving manual effort.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Strategy

  - [**Keyword Wins:**](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - **"best corporate language training platforms..."** → Jumped from \#26 to page one, now in AI Overviews.
          - [**Significance:** This is a high-difficulty (score 50) commercial keyword, making the rank jump a major success.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
          - [**Driver:** The homepage is ranking, supported by the site's overall authority on corporate training.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [**"Business English for Engineers"** → Also appearing in AI Overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
          - [**Actionable Idea:** Add a self-spend CTA to this page to capture individual learning budgets.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [**Traffic Discrepancy:**](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [**GA4:** Shows artificially low traffic due to a cookie bot blocking tags before consent.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [**GSC:** Shows \>400 organic visitors, a high volume for a new content push (typically \~200).](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
          - [**Significance:** GSC is a reliable source, as it's a direct report from Google and unaffected by on-site tracking issues.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Paola has configured the cookie bot to fire only in the EU. GrowthX will monitor for an immediate traffic recovery.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)

### Website Optimization

  - [**Pricing Page:** A feature grid will be added below the tiers to show exact inclusions (e.g., AI credits, Tally minutes).](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**"Talaera Professional" Page:** A new page will be created to define this tier's value proposition and recommended usage (e.g., "3x/week, 5 mins/day with Tally").](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**1-on-1 Coaching:** Will be positioned as an add-on or on a separate page.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

### Content Workflow Automation

  - [**Problem:** Manually copying content from Google Docs to WordPress is inefficient.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will use a WordPress API key to automate content staging.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
      - [**Process:** An editor pastes final content into a workflow → clicks a button → content is staged in WordPress.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Security:** The API key will be limited to content staging, not admin access. GrowthX will research if access can be further restricted to only the blog section.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
      - [Monitor GA4 traffic recovery after the cookie bot change.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
      - [Research if WordPress API key access can be restricted to the blog section.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
      - [Send the IT team's write-up on API key security.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
      - [Propose new landing page opportunities to support B2B keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [**Talaera:**](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with a WordPress API key for content automation.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
      - [Add the self-spend CTA to the "English for Engineers" page.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
      - [Add the successful webinar topic to the Notion doc for recycling.](https://fathom.video/share/k8BX1s3eAvxj_MVevjez7xgydaKq-uM4?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
